items.title: Skip the lettuce, cook your other greens and more advice on avoiding cyclosporiasis
items.description: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis, which causes diarrhea, has sickened about 6,700 people since May.

items.title: IBM’s stock just had its worst day ever after the surprise release of an earnings miss
items.description: IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenue that were well below expectations.

items.title: Lucid denies bankruptcy talk, but the stock still sinks to a record low
items.description: EV maker’s stock down more than 50% intraday, then pares the bulk of those losses after Lucid says ‘the rumors are completely false’

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
items.description: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

items.title: The next boost to Apple’s stock could come from an iPhone price hike
items.description: Morgan Stanley estimates that the iPhone 18 lineup could see a $200 price increase from the previous generation.

items.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: IBM workers pay a $400 million price for investing in company stock
items.description: Don’t put all your eggs in one basket

items.title: Global oil prices notch back-to-back rise, remain ‘tethered to the Hormuz narrative’
items.description: Global oil prices on Tuesday notched their largest two-day rise since mid-March, buoyed by further escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict.
